desc.warn: Use Google Chrome or Opera for a better experience. Edge is reported as not compatible!
desc.text: Let's be honest, this is maybe the only one generator. And if there are others, they won't have the same features we have. Easily turn your Minecraft skin into a printable, high-quality papercraft template. You can use your username, UUID, or upload a skin file directly!
desc.tagline: Bring your character to the real world!
desc.discord: If you have cool ideas, suggest them in our
desc.donate: If you found this tool useful, consider
desc.donate_end: for our hard work. We appreciate it!

controls.placeholder: Player Name, UUID, Base64 or URL...
